allow_instructions: Allow read-only git, gh, npm, and npx commands that inspect repo state, run linters, typecheck, or tests in this project.
Allow git add, git commit, and git push for routine WizCoCo workflow after code changes.
Allow read-only MCP, WebFetch, and WebSearch calls that retrieve data without destructive side effects.
block_instructions: Block destructive commands outside the project directory, force push to main, hard reset, and database or production deploy mutations unless explicitly requested.
Block commands that read or write secrets such as .env or credentials files.
